description: Validates that a partial with multiple root nodes is correctly wrapped in a fragment, and that invoker attributes/directives are applied to that wrapper.

assertNodes.description: The fragment wrapper should be created and should receive the attributes and directives from the invoker.
The h2 inside the fragment should NOT have the invoker's id but should have the p-fragment attribute.
The p inside the fragment should NOT have the invoker's id but should have the p-fragment attribute.
